//0: PREFERRED: enable the audit-toolkit plugin. Its hooks/hooks.json
//0a: wires these same four events automatically — you do NOT need this
//0b: file at all. Use this template ONLY for manual per-engineer wiring
//0c: (a repo not adopting the plugin, or a local-only opt-in).
//1: Copy this file to .claude/settings.local.json (or merge its 'hooks'
//2: block into your existing settings.local.json) and restart Claude
//3: Code to enable per-session tool-call logging.
//5: What you get: every tool call is appended to a per-session JSONL
//9: What you DON'T get: any kind of automatic block. The hooks do not
//10: stop pushes, commits, or PRs. Drift surfaces in the ledger and in
//11: /audit-history reports as visibility signals; follow-up is manual.
//13: settings.local.json is gitignored — manual wiring is per-engineer.
//14: The command paths below use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}, which resolves
//15: only when the audit-toolkit plugin is present. A repo that vendors
//16: the script instead must repoint these to its own copy's path.
